properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your kingdom generation declares Your majesty Our lives are resounding with Your praise We see Your spirit moving, we burn with holy fire And Your glory is seen through all the earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You set eternity in my heart So I'll live for You, for You, yeah

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah, honor and praise forever We'll shout a victory cry from here to eternity Hallelujah, Hallelujah, we'll take our place in history We'll shout Your awesome love from here to eternity

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You set eternity in my heart So I'll live for You, for You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah, honor and praise forever We'll shout a victory…
